title: Classmates
writer: Josephine Lovett, Margaret Turnbull, William C. de Mille
actors: Richard Barthelmess, Charlotte Walker, Madge Evans
plot: Duncan Irving, Jr., a poor boy from a small southern town who loves aristocratic Syliva Randolph, receives an appointment to West Point. In Duncan's final year Sylvia's cousin, Bert Stafford, also enters the academy and resents ha...
